deck: Strike x4, Defend x4, Bash, Headbutt, Shrug It Off, Thunderclap + Parasite curse
relics: Burning Blood, Neow's Lament, Ceramic Fish
cause_of_death: 2x Fungi Beast at F7 (Unknown room). Entered at 41/85 HP (48%) with Parasite curse clogging draws. Fungi Beast Str scaling reached 12 and 15 damage by Turn 6. Combined 27 incoming vs 18 max block = lethal at 9 HP.
key_moments: Neow's Lament gave 3 free fights but only Headbutt + SIO added to deck -- near-starter deck entered Sentries elite at F5.
Sentries fight took 20 turns (estimated 7-8), drained 56 HP (76->20). No AOE, Strikes dealing only 2 effective damage per hit through Metallicize 4.
Mushrooms event eaten for 21 HP heal at 20 HP -- playbook omitted that Eat gives Parasite curse. Curse clogged draws in subsequent Fungi fight.
Unknown at F7 resolved as combat at 48% HP. Fungi Beast Str scaling undocumented in playbook -- buff turns give +3 Str each, making late-fight damage 12-15 per Fungi instead of the documented ~9.
lessons: Sentries without AOE/damage scaling is a 20-turn, 56-HP-drain fight -- elite readiness is about DECK, not just HP.
Mushrooms Eat option gives Parasite curse (playbook corrected).
Fungi Beast buff is +3 Str per buff turn, not a passive -- damage escalates to 12-15 by Turn 5-6 (playbook corrected).
Neow's Lament creates a false elite-readiness signal: full HP after 3 free fights but starter-quality deck.
No command/sequence bugs found -- reported issues were player confusion with Headbutt selection interface.
